creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
I did just see a fetch failure in intel-ix-kmod, the distcache happens to have it though:

> ix-3.3.14.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://downloadmirror.intel.com/14688/eng/ix-3.3.14.tar.gz
fetch: https://downloadmirror.intel.com/14688/eng/ix-3.3.14.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://downloadmirror.intel.com/14688/eng/ix-3.3.14.tar.gz
fetch: http://downloadmirror.intel.com/14688/eng/ix-3.3.14.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/ix-3.3.14.tar.gz
ix-3.3.14.tar.gz
